name: Christmas Patchwork Frozen
short_description: Down the rabbit hole with Alice's Patchwork!
detailed_description:
Assemble patchwork mosaics while you travel with Alice and the famous characters of Wonderland and Looking-Glass Land!

120 unique levels: a mad tea-party, unbelievable royal croquet, a merry sea quadrille... What other pictures await you in 6 locations?
More than 10 hours of gameplay, convenient controls, and special quests and trophies.
Assemble mosaics from 6 different materials and help Alice become the queen of this incredible world.

- 120 unique patchwork mosaics and 6 different materials.
- Special quests and trophies for the real pros.
- Entertaining gameplay for players of all ages.
- Incredible story and characters familiar from childhood.
